mainEntity.name: My Boss Says the Machine Accident Was My Fault—Now What?
mainEntity.text: My Boss Says the Machine Accident Was My Fault—Now What?

acceptedAnswer.text: It’s a common tactic for companies to blame 'operator error.' Don't panic; Utah and Idaho workers' comp is generally a 'no-fault' system. This means you’re likely still covered even if you made a mistake. If they're trying to deny your claim based on fault, it’s time to involve a professional to protect your rights. Our team can help you navigate these tricky disputes.
